lint.command: uv run black --check mtb/ tests/ scripts/

blockingIssues.description: tests/integration/test_full_pipeline.py:234 allows parser verification to be bypassed via `assert parsed is not None or has_tool_content`, so VAL-INTEG-003 can pass without proving parser extraction.
tests/integration/test_full_pipeline.py:384 checks only that teardown is callable and does not assert that teardown was invoked, so VAL-INTEG-009 is not actually verified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust runner-change smoke-test guidance so `--help` is optional when known Fire/IPython incompatibility is present; provide a deterministic fallback check path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for contamination-variant-system flagged mismatch between skill Step 7 (`--help` smoke test) and mission AGENTS known issue that `fire.Fire --help` can crash.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD expectations for real-model integration tests: allow discovery-first iterations with explicit later tightening of assertions, while preserving strict verification gates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for integration-tests-real-model showed strict test-first flow was impractical due real-model output variance and led to weakened assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update ProblemSource documentation to reflect current implementation location and shape (ABC in `mtb/quality_benchmarks/scoring.py`, not Protocol in `problem_source.py`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for contamination-variant-system found `.factory/library/architecture.md` out of sync with implementation introduced in commit 73207123ea14e51cd2af12290e833109b6a19241.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add model-behavior note documenting Gemma 4 E2B-it tool-call key variance (`tool_name`/`params`) observed in integration testing to reduce repeated re-discovery.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for integration-tests-real-model found fallback logic and handoff notes tied to non-standard tool-call key names from real-model outputs.
